name: Liberty Bell Park
description: Liberty Bell Park is a place to play pickleball in Norfolk, NE. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include water and restrooms.

name: Norfolk Family YMCA
description: Norfolk Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Norfolk, NE. There are 4 indoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Reservations are available. Amenities include lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Norfolk Family YMCA Tennis and Pickleball Center
description: Norfolk Family YMCA Tennis and Pickleball Center is a place to play pickleball in Norfolk, NE. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Players have access to lights.
